title: gelsemium elegans
intro: Gelsemium elegans, also known as Chinese foxglove or yellow gelsemium, is a flowering plant in the Gelsemiaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. Gelsemium elegans is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving muscle spasms, reducing pain and inflammation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Gelsemium elegans include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat conditions like neuralgia, anxiety, and insomnia.
